content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad rally with strong global cues (Nasdaq +2%, Dow +1.24%) translating into multi-sector gains in India — defense, IT, FMCG, metals, financials, capital goods all up materially. My existing book is positioned well; many holdings showing strong gains today. Priority is locking in gains via SL trails on winners rather than stacking new entries.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24500,
      "nifty_resistance": 25200
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1035.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 1056.70, entry 984, +7.4% gain. Current SL 1035 is already above entry (locks in ~5%). CMP-SL gap is ~2%, within trail-gap discipline. Holding levels — bullish thesis intact (Q4 +19% PAT, NIM expansion, MOFSL Buy)."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 124.12 vs entry 125.10, slight loss. SL 121 (-2.5%) intact. Hedge value remains given experiment-end uncertainty; no action."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1730.00,
      "new_target": 1820.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 1757.10, entry 1700, +3.4%. SL already at 1730 (above entry, breakeven+). Trail-gap to CMP is 1.5%, acceptable. New 52w high broken; let it run to 1820 target. No-op MODIFY avoided — values match stored, so emitting HOLD instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 4630.40, entry 4575, +1.2%. SL 4540 (-0.7%) is tight — gap to CMP ~2%. Maintain as-is; +1.5% gain not yet at +2% breakeven trigger. Bullish defense capex thesis intact, target 4875."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 6900.00,
      "new_target": 7400.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 7049, entry 6900, +2.2%. SL at entry (breakeven) — appropriate per +2% trail rule. CMP-SL gap 2.1% (above 1% floor). Q4 record print (+124% PAT) supports continued upside to 7400. Values unchanged from stored — converting to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 830.00,
      "new_target": 900.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 845.20, entry 838, +0.9%. Stored SL 830 already in place. Gap to CMP ~1.8%. Below +2% breakeven trigger — leave as-is. Values unchanged — converting to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 363.00,
      "new_target": 388.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 368.70, entry 369 — flat. SL at 363 (-1.6%) intact. Strong Q4 (PAT +30.6%, AUM +16%); MACD bullish. Hold the level. Values unchanged — converting to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 822.55, entry 820, +0.3%. SL 815 intact. Q4 print today was strong (+18% PAT, +22% revenue, ATH 843.15). Below +2% trigger so no SL trail yet; let it consolidate post-print."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 1279.10, entry 1259, +1.6%. SL 1245 (-1.1%) tight, acceptable. Below +2% trigger. Q4 PAT +130% YoY, 10% upper-circuit move — wide intraday range, leave SL room to breathe rather than choke a working winner."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 2990.00,
      "new_target": 3225.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 3034, entry 3025, +0.3%. SL 2990 (-1.5%) tight. Below +2% trigger — no trail yet. Defense rally risk: GRSE +49% in April, mean-reversion possible; keep SL respected. Values unchanged — converting to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 807.30, entry 806, +0.2% — flat post-Q4 print. SL 795 intact. Q4 EBITDA all-time high; let post-result momentum develop. No SL trail until +2%."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "HFCL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "MIS",
      "confidence": 0.50,
      "timeframe": "INTRADAY",
      "reasoning": "Pending HFCL MIS LIMIT BUY @ 133.50 placed 1794m (~30hr) ago — likely stale from prior session. Cannot CANCEL via this schema; flagging for review. The order is past its valid intraday context; if engine carries it forward, it should be cancelled."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1035.00,
      "reasoning": "SL already at +5% above entry; gap to CMP 2%; thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 121.00,
      "reasoning": "Hedge component; minor drawdown within tolerance."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1730.00,
      "reasoning": "SL above entry, locking in profit; 52w breakout in progress."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 4540.00,
      "reasoning": "Below +2% trigger; SL gap appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 6900.00,
      "reasoning": "Breakeven SL already set; record Q4 print supports run to 7400."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 830.00,
      "reasoning": "Below +2% gain threshold; existing SL stands."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 363.00,
      "reasoning": "Flat P&L; strong Q4 print, give thesis room."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 815.00,
      "reasoning": "Q4 day; ATH printed; below +2% trail trigger."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1245.00,
      "reasoning": "Wide intraday range from upper-circuit; tight SL already in place."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 2990.00,
      "reasoning": "Defense rally extended; SL tight."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 795.00,
      "reasoning": "Post-Q4 momentum; below trail trigger."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "M&M, VEDL, HINDPETRO, CHOLAHLDNG showing strong moves but: (a) book is already deployed with 11 CNC positions, deployed capital meaningful, (b) CHOLAHLDNG board meeting May 8 is binary (next session) — NO new entry per Rule 11, (c) HINDPETRO has Q4 May 13 binary + bearish research overhang (LPG under-recoveries) — pass, (d) VEDL just demerged May 1, structurally complex, post-corporate-action volatility — pass, (e) M&M is clean technically but adds Auto cluster risk and book is full. No new entries this tick.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is well-positioned for today's broad rally — 11 CNC names across Financials (PNBHOUSING, ABCAPITAL, CAMS), Capital Goods/Defense (HAL, GRSE, TITAGARH), IT (COFORGE), FMCG (MARICO), Chemicals (NAVINFLUOR), Services (ADANIPORTS), Hedge (GOLDBEES). Most holdings either at breakeven SL or with tight protective SL. Discipline now: do NOT add new positions while existing book is consolidating gains. Pending stale HFCL order needs cancellation by engine. Cumulative -53.7% drawdown demands strict capital preservation — no over-trading."
}
